reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
우리 아기가 조아하는
오뎅스틱 저렴하게
두개 살 수 있어서
좋아요😍😍
색상도 넘 이쁘고
우리아이가 만족해하네용💛💛
reviews.content_en: Our baby loves it 😍😍 I like that I can get two odeng sticks for a cheap price. The colors are also really pretty and our little one is happy with it 💛💛

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 어릴 때 좋아했던 강아지풀 모양 사줬는데 도착하자마자 흔들어줬더니 냉큼 물고 가서는 한 시간을 놀더라고요. 그러더니 결국…하나 더 닜으니 그건 제가 흔들어 줘야겠어요.
reviews.content_en: I gave my puppy the grass-shaped toy that they loved when they were little, and as soon as it arrived I waved it and they quickly grabbed it and played for an hour. Then eventually... I had to get another one because I need to be the one waving it.

reviews.name: 백****
reviews.content: 뜯기전부터 좋아해요. 마감이 좀 허술해 보이긴 히는데 저희 고양이가 딱 좋아하는 스타일이에요. 흰색이 안와서 아쉽지만 잘 쓸게요
reviews.content_en: They love it even before opening it. The finishing looks a bit rough, but it's exactly the style our cat loves. It's a shame the white one didn't come, but we'll use it well.

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 고양이가 디지버지는 오뎅꼬치! 너무 좋아하네요
reviews.content_en: Our cat is obsessed with the odeng stick! They absolutely love it 😻

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 난리났어요 ㅋㅋㅋ 오뎅꼬치 좋아하는데 신났쯤 ㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It was crazy lol 😂 They love odeng sticks and they got so excited hehe

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 카페에서  오뎅꼬치에  열광하는  냥이보고  따라샀어요. 저희 냥이아직은  쏘쏘한거같은데  하나는  포장해서 까칠얘민 친구냥이 보내주려구요 친구냥인 좋아했으면 좋겠어요.저렴한 가격에 감사합니다
reviews.content_en: I saw a cat at a café going crazy for the odeng stick, so I bought one too. Our cat seems so-so about it so far, but I'm wrapping one up to send to my friend's cat. Hope their cat likes it. Thank you for the affordable price 🐱

reviews.name: 배****
reviews.content:
냥이 주려고 구매했어요 저렴하게 잘 사서 너무 기분 좋아용ㅎㅎ 냥이가 좋아했으면 좋겠네용
넉넉하게 두개라 망가질만큼 열심히 놀아줘여겠오요
reviews.content_en: I bought it for my cat. I'm so happy I got such a great deal at this price 😊 Hope my cat likes it. Since you get two generously, I'll let them play with it until it breaks 💪

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content: 이것저것 놀아줘도 고전이 제일인지 오뎅꼬치에 다시 낚이기 시작해서 구입했어요
reviews.content_en: No matter what other toys I give them, classics are the best—they're hooked on the odeng stick again, so I bought it.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 반응이 상당해요 뜯은지 10분만에 걸레짝을 만들어버리네요
reviews.content_en: The reaction is amazing. Within 10 minutes of opening it, it's already turned into a rag 😅

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content: 오뎅꼬치 이렇게 좋아할 줄 몰랐는데 재구매 할거에요!
reviews.content_en: I didn't know they'd love the odeng stick this much! I'm going to buy it again! 🐾

reviews.name: 차****
reviews.content: 제일 좋아하는 장난감이에요
reviews.content_en: It's their favorite toy 🐱

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 냥이들이 너무 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: The cats love it so much 😻

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 애기들이 좋아해요 탄탄하니 깃털보다 요런게 더 재밌낭
reviews.content_en: The kids love it. It's sturdy and way more fun than feather toys 🎉

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 귀여워요 물고다니려고 하면서 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: It's cute and they love carrying it around in their mouth 💕

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 아이가 물고 놓지 않아 놀이하기가 쉽지 않네요
reviews.content_en: My baby won't let go of it, so it's not easy to play with them 😅

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 울집 냥이가 좋아합니다.
reviews.content_en: Our cat loves it.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 동생네 냥이한테 선물했는데 아직 반응은 못들었어요ㅋ오뎅꼬치는 처음 사줘봤는데 잘 놀기를..♡
reviews.content_en: I gave it as a gift to my sister's cat, but haven't heard the feedback yet lol. It's the first time we bought an odeng stick for them, hope they play with it well ♡

reviews.name: 선****
reviews.content: 아직 사용은 안 해봤어요. 고양이랑 친해졌으면 좋겠어요.
reviews.content_en: Haven't used it yet. I hope the cat will warm up to it 🐱

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 수량 2개로 잘못샀네요 .. 애들이 잘 가지규 놀아요. 근데 조금 부실한거같긴해요 ㅠ
reviews.content_en: I accidentally bought 2 sets instead of 1... The kids play with them really well. But it seems a bit flimsy 😢

reviews.name: 배****
reviews.content: 비닐안쪽에 제품에 묻어있는 분?같은데 묻어 있어요 털고 청소기로 먼지 흡입한뒤에 놀아줬어요 흰색오뎅꼬치는 벌써 분리됐어요
reviews.content_en: There's some powdery substance on the product inside the plastic. I dusted it off and vacuumed the dust before playing with it. The white odeng stick already came apart 😔

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
2개에 한세트인중 모르고 2개 구매해서 오뎅코치 부자가 됐어요 
유명한 장난감 브랜드 오뎅꼬치보다 튼튼하고 털이 풍성해서 이제 어르신인 저희 집 냥이도 잘 갖고 놀아요!! 저렴하게 잘 샀네요 바잇미 짱~!!
reviews.content_en: I didn't know one set came with 2, so I bought 2 sets and became an odeng stick millionaire! 😂 It's sturdier than the famous toy brand odeng sticks and has fuller fur, so even our elderly cat at home plays with it well now! Got a great deal. BITE ME is the best~!! 🐾

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 오뎅꼬치가 질도 좋은거 같아요.제가 만져도 보들보들함 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: The odeng stick seems really good quality. Even when I touch it, it's so soft haha 😄

reviews.name: 심****
reviews.content: 엄청 좋아하네요 금액도 저렴한데 진즉 사줄껄
reviews.content_en: They love it so much. The price is affordable too—wish I bought it sooner 💕

reviews.name: 소****
reviews.content: 강아지가 좋아해요~~~~ 사냥놀이 좋아하는 강쥐한테 쵝오
reviews.content_en: My puppy loves it~~~~ Perfect for dogs who love hunting play 🐕

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content: 저희 고양이가 엄청 좋아해요 잘가지고 높니다
reviews.content_en: Our cat loves it so much. They carry it around really well 😻

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 장난감 좋아해요 금방 떨어져서 재구매했어요
reviews.content_en: Love the toy. It wore out quickly so I bought it again 🎾

reviews.name: 허****
reviews.content: 너무 자극적인 장난감밖에 없어서 오뎅꼬치 샀는데 그래도 주인냥은 좋아하네요!
reviews.content_en: There were only overstimulating toys, so I bought the odeng stick, and the owner cat still loves it! 🐱

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
장난감이랑 여러가지 놀아주려고 샀는데~
아이가 잘 가지고 놀아요~♡
reviews.content_en: I bought it to play with them using various toys~ My baby plays with it so well~ ♡

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
소리안나서 밤에 놀아주기에 좋은 ㅎ
필수템
reviews.content_en: No sound so it's great for playing at night hehe. Essential item 🌙

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 흔들어주면 고양이가 좋아해요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: The cat loves it when I wave it hehe 😻

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 엄청 좋아하진 않지만 그래도 잘 가지고 놀아줘요
reviews.content_en: She doesn't absolutely love it, but she still plays with it pretty well

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 냥이는 좋아하는데 털이 너무 많이 빠지네요 고양이털보다 더 빠져요
reviews.content_en: My cat likes it, but it sheds so much hair. It sheds even more than cat hair does

reviews.name: 함****
reviews.content:
내구성 별로에요..
반응은 좋긴한데 이틀만에 망가졌어요
reviews.content_en: The durability is not great.. She reacted well to it at first, but it broke after just two days
